name: shared-data
description: Shared data primitives: geographic (states, regions, airports, slugify) + the tagged destination universe (party cities, golf courses, estate residences, TDF golf-trip destinations, MOH/BESTMAN locals) consumed by all wizard sites via per-wizard overlays.

scripts.verify: tsx scripts/verify-universe.ts && tsx scripts/check-brand-rules.ts && tsx scripts/audit/index.ts
